verdict_reason: Tags (deprecation-management, release-discipline, duty) span the bridge: deprecation-management ties to 2.26-2.28 (the imperishable cluster), duty ties to 2.31+ (the karma-yoga block), and release-discipline ties to 2.47 (the famous niṣkāma-karma verse). This three-tag combination operationalizes the bridge function. No subtle drift; the cross-reference forward to 2.31 (and back-implicitly to 2.20-2.25) is load-bearing.
